message:
Add DO NOT INDEX marker to skip meta-conversations

Implements conversation-level exclusion via marker in content.

Feature:
- Conversations containing the marker are copied but not indexed
- Prevents pollution of search index with tool invocations
- Use in subagent prompts: <INSTRUCTIONS-TO-EPISODIC-MEMORY>DO NOT INDEX THIS CHAT</INSTRUCTIONS-TO-EPISODIC-MEMORY>

Benefits over path-based exclusions:
- Self-documenting - conversation declares its own exclusion
- Works for any use case (summarization, meta-work, sensitive content)
- No maintenance of exclusion lists

Test coverage: Verifies marked conversation is copied but not indexed
